programmes.show_description: A workaholic is raped after attending a shady elite party with her boss.
Carisi's niece helps a friend to report a sexual assault. Benson investigates a college's secret society that preys on female students.
The creator of a dating app is accused of using it to rape women. Velasco's experience as an SVU detective is put on trial.
Harold goes on a road trip with the Machine, while the rest of the team receive a new number - the President of the United States.
Callen becomes embroiled in a case involving counterfeit computer chips and a former KGB operative who could hold the key to his past.
A deputy tries to level with a man who's struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Dead Air: US crime drama series. The team investigates the death of a radio DJ and a naval officer who were both killed live on air.
Cracked: US crime drama series. The team worries about Abby when she becomes too involved with solving the murder of a naval scientist. Meanwhile, Tony's newest fling brings trouble.
Broken Arrow: US crime drama series. The team is surprised when Gibbs asks Tony's father to join them in a murder investigation.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Smoke: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a child who fell out of a high-rise window.
Bodies: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. While investigating the death of a teenager, the detectives think they have stumbled onto the work of a serial killer.
When a notorious bounty hunter is found dead in a seedy motel room, Briscoe and Green piece together his last movements, which include a meeting with an up-and-coming journalist.
Veteran's Day: Drama series about law enforcement. A Gulf War veteran is arrested on suspicion of murdering an anti-war protester.
Can I Get A Witness: Crime drama series. A man is arrested for the fatal shooting of a teenager, only to escape conviction when the prosecution's star witness is murdered.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Hands Free: Drama series about law enforcement. Prosecutors attempt to convict a wealthy cross dresser of killing and dismembering his lover.
US crime drama series. Vance creates a task force to catch a serial killer who murders service personnel after they land in ports.
Dead Reflection: US crime drama series. When a Pentagon security camera catches a petty officer committing a murder, the NCIS team sets out to track down the killer.
Baltimore: US crime drama series. When Tony's former partner is found murdered and linked to the Port-to-Port serial killer, Tony remembers his days as a detective in Baltimore.
A year since Rossi nearly died at the hands of Everett Lynch, a.k.a. The Chameleon, he's developed some new theories, with inspiration from his former partner, Jason Gideon.
When the case against a popular sports star falls through, Benson digs into the suspect's past to uncover additional victims; Velasco is disappointed when he meets one of his heroes.
The SVU hunts for a violent suspect who killed a detective's child; Rollins ponders a potential opportunity.
Velasco asks Benson for help in finding three girls who were trafficked from his hometown to New York City.
Rollins and Fin investigate an assault in Kentucky that has striking similarities to that of a victim found in Central Park. Benson receives intel that turns the case upside down.
After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favourite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her from the perpetrators.
When tragedy strikes the family of a prominent judge, Brady must determine if the murder is connected to any of her rulings. Baxter steps in when a key witness refuses to testify.
After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman's lies one-by-one.

A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Enemies Foreign: US crime drama series. The team has to protect Ziva's father when he attends the NCIS conference. Ziva confronts her past.
Enemies Domestic: US crime drama series. After an ambush changes the course of their investigation, the NCIS team has to find answers quickly.
False Witness: US crime drama. This week, the team search for a key witness in a murder trial who has been scared off giving evidence after receiving a threat at the safe house.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Patient Zero: Drama series about cops and lawyers. Detectives are puzzled when they discover the victim of a lethal carjacking was carrying a vial of the SARS virus.
Shrunk: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. An aspiring actress is found stabbed to death in the apartment of a famous songwriter.
Blaze: Police drama series. Cops investigate a blaze at an overcrowded gig in which 23 people died. Briscoe and Green suspect the band's lead singer is responsible.
Evil Breeds: Legal drama series. When an elderly woman is found murdered in her apartment, suspects include a Nazi war criminal who stood to gain the most from her death.
Nowhere Man: US crime drama. The investigation into the murder of a district attorney takes a sudden twist when police learn that the man was an impostor.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Everyone Loves Raimondo's: Drama series about law enforcement. The detectives investigate the murder of a Hollywood producer whose death could be mob-related.
Swan Song: US crime drama series. The NCIS team chase every possible lead when the latest victim of the Port-to-Port killer turns out to be someone with personal ties to the team.
When the Port-to-Port killer is finally revealed, the entire NCIS team find themselves in grave danger.
Gibbs and the team have to find answers regarding Tony's assignment when an NCIS agent is found dead.
Erin disagrees with a psychiatric consultant's diagnosis of a nanny accused of abuse, Eddie confronts her boss and a woman claims she heard someone plotting a murder.
After a woman's body is found at a men's-only club, Danny and Baez investigate whether it was an accident. Frank learns of an illicit affair involving the chief of Internal Affairs.
